---
title: "RNA-Seq Differential Expression Analysis"
subtitle: "Tumor vs Normal Tissue Comparison"
author: "Ishan Maheshwari | MSc Genomics Data Science, University of Galway"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: false
      smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    theme: cosmo
    highlight: kate
    code_folding: hide
    fig_width: 12
    fig_height: 8
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
body {
  font-family: 'Helvetica Neue', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 1.6;
  color: #333;
}

h1 {
  color: #2c3e50;
  border-bottom: 3px solid #3498db;
  padding-bottom: 10px;
  margin-top: 30px;
}

h2 {
  color: #34495e;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #95a5a6;
  padding-bottom: 8px;
  margin-top: 25px;
}

.summary-box {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
  color: white;
  padding: 25px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  margin: 20px 0;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
}

.key-finding {
  background-color: #f0f8ff;
  border-left: 5px solid #3498db;
  padding: 15px;
  margin: 15px 0;
  border-radius: 5px;
}

.upregulated-box {
  background-color: #ffe6e6;
  border-left: 5px solid #e74c3c;
  padding: 15px;
  margin: 15px 0;
  border-radius: 5px;
}

.downregulated-box {
  background-color: #e6f2ff;
  border-left: 5px solid #3498db;
  padding: 15px;
  margin: 15px 0;
  border-radius: 5px;
}

table {
  width: 100%;
  margin: 20px 0;
}

thead {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%);
  color: white;
}

th {
  padding: 12px;
  text-align: left;
}

td {
  padding: 10px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
}

tr:hover {
  background-color: #f5f5f5;
}

img {
  border-radius: 8px;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
  margin: 20px auto;
  display: block;
}
```

```r
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  dpi = 300
)

library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)
```

Executive Summary
```r<div class="summary-box"> <h3>🔬 Study Overview</h3> <p>Comprehensive RNA-seq analysis comparing <strong>tumor vs normal tissue</strong>, identifying <strong>3,296 differentially expressed genes</strong> and revealing cancer-associated molecular signatures.</p> </div><div class="key-finding">
```
Key Findings:
- 3,296 genes differentially expressed (16.7% of transcriptome)
- 1,654 upregulated → proliferation pathways
- 1,642 downregulated → immune pathways
- Fold changes: 0.04x to 28.1x
```r
</div><div class="upregulated-box"> **🔺 Upregulated Pathways:** Cell cycle, DNA replication, mitosis → Uncontrolled proliferation ✅ </div><div class="downregulated-box"> **🔻 Downregulated Pathways:** Immune response, defense mechanisms → Immune evasion ✅ </div>
```

1. Introduction

1.1 Background
RNA-seq enables genome-wide gene expression profiling. This project demonstrates a complete bioinformatics pipeline for differential expression analysis in cancer research.

1.2 Research Question
Which genes and pathways are dysregulated in tumor tissue compared to normal tissue?

1.3 Dataset
```r
metadata <- readRDS("data/raw/sample_metadata.rds")
kable(metadata, caption = "Sample Metadata (12 samples)", align = "c")
```

Dataset characteristics:
- 20,000 genes
- 12 samples (6 tumor, 6 normal)
- ~2.3M reads/sample
- 91.4% gene detection rate

2. Quality Control

2.1 QC Summary
```r
qc_data <- read.csv("results/tables/qc_summary.csv")
kable(qc_data, caption = "Quality Control Metrics", 
      format.args = list(big.mark = ","))
```

2.2 PCA Analysis
```r
knitr::include_graphics("results/figures/05_pca_plot.png")
```
Interpretation: PC1 (24.2%) separates tumor from normal. Clear biological signal ✅

2.3 Sample Correlation
```r
knitr::include_graphics("results/figures/04_sample_correlation.png")
```

3. Differential Expression

3.1 Summary
```r
de_results <- read.csv("results/tables/DE_results_full.csv")
sig_genes <- read.csv("results/tables/DE_results_significant.csv")

summary_data <- data.frame(
  Metric = c("Total genes", "DE genes", "Upregulated", "Downregulated"),
  Value = c(nrow(de_results), nrow(sig_genes),
            sum(sig_genes$direction == "Upregulated"),
            sum(sig_genes$direction == "Downregulated"))
)

kable(summary_data, caption = "DE Analysis Summary")
```
Criteria: padj < 0.05, |log2FC| ≥ 1

3.2 Volcano Plot
```r
knitr::include_graphics("results/figures/07_volcano_plot.png")
```

3.3 Top Genes

Upregulated
```r
top_up <- read.csv("results/tables/DE_genes_upregulated.csv") %>%
  slice_min(padj, n = 10) %>%
  mutate(FC = round(2^log2FoldChange, 1),
         padj = sprintf("%.2e", padj)) %>%
  select(gene, FC, log2FoldChange, padj)

kable(top_up, col.names = c("Gene", "FC", "Log2FC", "Padj"),
      caption = "Top 10 Upregulated Genes")
```

Downregulated
```r
top_down <- read.csv("results/tables/DE_genes_downregulated.csv") %>%
  slice_min(padj, n = 10) %>%
  mutate(FC = round(2^log2FoldChange, 3),
         padj = sprintf("%.2e", padj)) %>%
  select(gene, FC, log2FoldChange, padj)

kable(top_down, col.names = c("Gene", "FC", "Log2FC", "Padj"),
      caption = "Top 10 Downregulated Genes")
```

3.4 Heatmap
```r
knitr::include_graphics("results/figures/09_heatmap_top_genes.png")
```

4. Pathway Enrichment

4.1 Upregulated Pathways
```r
go_up <- read.csv("results/tables/GO_enrichment_upregulated.csv")
kable(go_up %>% select(Description, GeneRatio, p.adjust, Count) %>%
        mutate(p.adjust = sprintf("%.2e", p.adjust)),
      caption = "Enriched Pathways (Upregulated Genes)")
```
```r
knitr::include_graphics("results/figures/12_GO_upregulated_barplot.png")
```
```r
<div class="upregulated-box"> **Biological Interpretation:**
Cell cycle activation → uncontrolled division
DNA replication → preparing for mitosis
Cancer hallmark: Sustained proliferation
</div>
```

4.2 Downregulated Pathways
```r
go_down <- read.csv("results/tables/GO_enrichment_downregulated.csv")
kable(go_down %>% select(Description, GeneRatio, p.adjust, Count) %>%
        mutate(p.adjust = sprintf("%.2e", p.adjust)),
      caption = "Enriched Pathways (Downregulated Genes)")
```
```r
knitr::include_graphics("results/figures/14_GO_downregulated_barplot.png")
```
```r
<div class="downregulated-box"> **Biological Interpretation:**
Immune response suppressed → tumor hiding
Defense mechanisms impaired
Cancer hallmark: Immune evasion ✅
</div>
```

4.3 Pathway Comparison
```r
knitr::include_graphics("results/figures/16_GO_combined_comparison.png")
```

5. Conclusions

5.1 Cancer Hallmarks
```r
hallmarks <- data.frame(
  Hallmark = c("Sustaining proliferation", "Evading growth suppressors",
               "Resisting cell death", "Replicative immortality", 
               "Immune evasion"),
  Evidence = c("Cell cycle (95 genes)", "Unchecked division (78 genes)",
               "Continued proliferation", "DNA replication (65 genes)",
               "Immune suppression (89 genes)"),
  Status = rep("✅", 5)
)

kable(hallmarks, caption = "Cancer Hallmarks Detected")
```

5.2 Clinical Implications
```r
<div class="key-finding"> **Therapeutic Opportunities:**
CDK4/6 inhibitors → target cell cycle
Checkpoint inhibitors → restore immunity
Combination therapy recommended
</div>
```

6. Methods

Analysis Pipeline:
- Normalization: DESeq2 median-of-ratios
- Batch correction: ~ batch + condition
- FDR correction: Benjamini-Hochberg (α=0.05)
- Software: R 4.4, Bioconductor, DESeq2

7. References
- Love et al. (2014). Genome Biology 15:550
- Yu et al. (2012). OMICS 16(5):284-287
- Hanahan & Weinberg (2011). Cell 144:646-674
```r
<div class="summary-box" style="margin-top: 40px; text-align: center;"> <h2 style="color: white; margin-top: 0;">🎓 Analysis Completed</h2> <p style="font-size: 18px;"><strong>Ishan Maheshwari</strong></p> <p>MSc Genomics Data Science | University of Galway</p> <p>📧 ishanmaheshwari02@gmail.com</p> <p>💼 <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/ishanmaheshwari2001" style="color: white; text-decoration: underline;">LinkedIn Profile</a></p> <p><em>Generated: `r format(Sys.Date(), '%B %d, %Y')`</em></p> </div> 
```
